title: Incursa.Quic Public API Surface Promotion Work Item
summary: Promote the approved consumer-facing Incursa.Quic API surface, refine its lifecycle semantics from Microsoft test evidence, and hide the helper-layer implementation seams.
planned_changes:
- Add the public listener, connection, stream, options, error, and callback types named in the specification.
- Keep the packet, frame, TLS, handshake, runtime, recovery, congestion, and stream-identity helpers internal.
- Reconcile the public API analyzer files with the approved consumer surface.
- Preserve the client/server split and avoid broadening the public contract into middleware.
- Encode the async cancellation, option-validation, stream-completion, and close/error semantics reflected by the Microsoft reference tests.
out_of_scope: Adding new transport features beyond the approved facade.
verification_plan: Use API-diff and reflection-based surface checks, plus compile-time access tests, to prove the approved public types are visible and the listed seam types are not. Add focused consumer-behavior tests for mandatory option validation, cancellation on pending lifecycle operations, stream completion tasks, and close/error propagation. Keep the proof focused on surface shape rather than wire behavior; this slice does not require fuzzing or benchmarks.
completion_notes: This item exists to promote the consumer facade only. The internal transport engine stays intact.

supplemental_sections.heading: Reference Behavioral Evidence
supplemental_sections.content:
- `C:\src\dotnet\runtime\src\libraries\System.Net.Quic\tests\FunctionalTests\QuicListenerTests.cs`
- `C:\src\dotnet\runtime\src\libraries\System.Net.Quic\tests\FunctionalTests\QuicConnectionTests.cs`
- `C:\src\dotnet\runtime\src\libraries\System.Net.Quic\tests\FunctionalTests\QuicStreamTests.cs`
- `C:\src\dotnet\runtime\src\libraries\System.Net.Quic\tests\FunctionalTests\QuicStreamConnectedStreamConformanceTests.cs`
- `C:\src\dotnet\runtime\src\libraries\System.Net.Quic\tests\FunctionalTests\MsQuicCipherSuitesPolicyTests.cs`
- `C:\src\dotnet\runtime\src\libraries\System.Net.Quic\tests\FunctionalTests\MsQuicTests.cs`

These reference tests are the behavioral evidence for the initial public surface shape and the lifecycle semantics that still need to be implemented and proven in the target repo.
